```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# WGBS 分析流程 - Step 1: 全局配置入口
# ==============================================================================

# ==============================================================================
# 1. 项目初始化与依赖加载
# ==============================================================================
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options(timeout = 600)

# --- 加载依赖包 ---
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  # 1. 基因组基础
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomicFeatures)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(rtracklayer)

  # 2. 甲基化分析工具
  library(methylKit)
  library(DSS)
  library(bsseq)

  # 3. 数据处理与绘图
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(stringr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(ggalluvial)
  library(scales)
  library(ggnewscale)
  library(GOplot)
  library(Cairo)
  library(cowplot)
  library(UpSetR)
  library(ggdist)
  library(fgsea)
  library(Gviz)

  # 4. 注释与富集
  library(ChIPseeker)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Mm.eg.db) # 确保已安装
  library(enrichplot)
  library(ggtree)  # 用于绘制圆形树状图
  library(ape)     # 用于 as.phylo 函数
  library(circlize) # 用于绘制弦图
  library(ComplexHeatmap) # 用于圈图
  library(RColorBrewer)    # 用于颜色配置
  library(grid)         # 用于gpar函数

  # 5. Motif 分析 (如果不需要可注释掉)
  library(motifmatchr)
  library(BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39)
  library(JASPAR2020)
})
```

```{r}
# --- 路径与参数配置 ---
first_nonempty <- function(...) {
  for(value in list(...)) {
    if(is.null(value) || length(value) == 0) next
    value_chr <- trimws(as.character(value[[1]]))
    if(!is.na(value_chr) && nzchar(value_chr)) return(value_chr)
  }
  ""
}

resolve_project_root <- function() {
  root_candidate <- first_nonempty(
    get0("root_dir", ifnotfound = "", inherits = TRUE),
    Sys.getenv("WGBS_ROOT_DIR", unset = ""),
    getwd()
  )
  normalizePath(root_candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

root_dir <- resolve_project_root()
repo_root_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(root_dir, "..", ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
rna_seq_root_dir <- file.path(repo_root_dir, "rna_seq", "testis")
atac_root_dir <- file.path(repo_root_dir, "atac", "liver")
reads_info_path <- file.path(root_dir, "01rawdata", "reads_info.txt")

config <- list(
  # 路径设置
  work_dir     = root_dir,
  ref_base_dir = file.path(repo_root_dir, "reference", "GRCm39"),
  input_rdata  = "04methykit/CpG.RData",
  gtf_file     = file.path(repo_root_dir, "reference", "GRCm39", "Mus_musculus.GRCm39.115.gtf"),
  cpg_island_file = file.path(repo_root_dir, "reference", "GRCm39", "mm39_cpgIslandExt.txt.gz"),
  repeatmasker_file = file.path(repo_root_dir, "reference", "GRCm39", "mm39_rmsk.txt.gz"),

  # 外部数据路径
  rna_seq_file  = file.path(rna_seq_root_dir, "4.DE_analysis", "DE_results"),
  rna_kegg_file = file.path(rna_seq_root_dir, "result", "06_enrichment", "01_all", "tables", "6_1_KEGG_ORA_results.csv"),
  wgbs_kegg_file = "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/kegg_enrichment_results.csv",

  # ATAC-seq 数据路径 (可选，如不存在则跳过)
  atac_peak_dir = file.path(atac_root_dir, "result"),
  atac_diff_dir = file.path(atac_root_dir, "4.Differential_binding"),

  # 样本分组定义
  group1_name  = NULL,
  group2_name  = NULL,
  group1_idx   = integer(),
  group2_idx   = integer(),

  # DMR calling 阈值
  # 当前口径：
  # 1. 显著 CpG 位点占比 >= 50%
  # 2. 区域长度 >= 50 bp
  # 3. 区域内至少 5 个 CpG
  # 4. group2 - group1 甲基化差异绝对值 >= 0.10
  dmr_p_threshold = 0.05,
  dmr_pct_sig = 0.5,
  dmr_minlen = 50,
  dmr_minCG = 5,
  dmr_delta = 0.10,
  dss_smoothing = TRUE,
  dss_smoothing_span = 500L,
  dss_ncores = as.integer(Sys.getenv("WGBS_DSS_NCORES", unset = "4")),
  dmr_dis_merge = 50L,

  # 稳健性与交叉验证
  dmr_sensitivity_delta = c(0.05, 0.10, 0.15),
  dmr_sensitivity_pct_sig = c(0.3, 0.5, 0.7),
  dmr_sensitivity_minCG = c(3, 5, 10),
  run_dmrseq_crosscheck = !identical(Sys.getenv("WGBS_SKIP_DMRSEQ", unset = ""), "1"),
  dmrseq_max_permutations = as.integer(Sys.getenv("WGBS_DMRSEQ_MAX_PERMUTATIONS", unset = "20")),

  # 下游展示/筛选阈值
  # 当前继续保留既有 pvalue < 0.05 结果口径，避免改变已产出的分析结论。
  # 严格解读或投稿时建议同步检查 RNA padj < 0.05，富集结果优先报告 p.adjust/qvalue < 0.05。
  rna_p_threshold = 0.05,
  rna_p_adjust_threshold = 0.05,
  rna_log2fc_threshold = 0.58,
  multiomics_methyl_delta = 0.10,
  cgi_diff_methyl_pct = 15L,
  enrichment_p_threshold = 0.05,
  enrichment_adjust_threshold = 0.05,
  enrichment_top_n_kegg = 20L,
  enrichment_top_n_go = 15L,
  enrichment_goplot_top_n = 10L,
  enrichment_cnet_show_category = 5L,
  enrichment_tree_show_category = 15L,
  enrichment_theme_regex = "metabolic|metabolism|insulin",
  enrichment_theme_quadrants = c("Hypo-Up", "Hyper-Down"),

  # 区域定义与可视化窗口
  promoter_upstream = 2000L,
  promoter_downstream = 2000L,
  sperm_promoter_upstream = 2000L,
  sperm_promoter_downstream = 500L,
  sperm_icr_file = file.path(root_dir, "rmd", "resources", "mouse_icr_regions.tsv"),
  spermatogenesis_gene_file = file.path(root_dir, "rmd", "resources", "spermatogenesis_genes.tsv"),
  cgi_shore_width = 2000L,
  cgi_shelf_width = 2000L,
  genome_context_upstream_width = 2000L,
  genome_context_sample_downsample_n = 5000L,
  qc_corr_max_sites = as.integer(Sys.getenv("WGBS_QC_CORR_MAX_SITES", unset = "500000")),
  qc_corr_seed = 20260520L,
  browser_gene_flank = 20000L,
  browser_dmr_flank = 5000L,

  # 计算量较大的可视化/功能模块参数
  bsmooth_primary_ns = 70L,
  bsmooth_primary_h = 1000L,
  bsmooth_fallback_ns = 50L,
  bsmooth_fallback_h = 2000L,
  motif_top_n = 500L,
  motif_background_seed = 20260520L,
  repeatmasker_candidates = c(
    "mm39_rmsk.txt.gz",
    "mm39_rmsk.txt",
    "rmsk.txt",
    "rmsk.txt.gz",
    "repeatmasker.txt",
    "repeatmasker.txt.gz"
  )
)

# 设置工作目录
if(dir.exists(config$work_dir)) {
  setwd(config$work_dir)
  message("\u2705 工作目录设置完成: ", getwd())
} else {
  stop("\u274c 工作目录不存在: ", config$work_dir)
}

if(!file.exists(reads_info_path)) {
  stop("❌ 未找到 01rawdata/reads_info.txt: ", reads_info_path)
}
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# Stage 2 结构总览
# 3. 读取 stage1 cache 并按需恢复大对象
# 4. 功能富集与 GSEA
# 5. 全局基因组上下文
# 6. 特定区域与调控注释
# 7. 多组学联合分析
# 8. DEG-focused 甲基化分析
# 9. 轨道导出与代表性位点浏览图
# ==============================================================================
# ==============================================================================
# 2. 通用配置与辅助函数 (Shared Helpers)
# ==============================================================================
# 这一节和 stage1 共用同一套 helper 逻辑，保证方向、主染色体过滤、配色和输出格式完全一致。
# 这样即使 stage2 单独运行，也不会因为 helper 口径漂移而得到不同结果。

first_existing_col <- function(df, candidates) {
  hits <- candidates[candidates %in% colnames(df)]
  if(length(hits) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hits[1]
}

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if(is.null(x)) y else x
}

safe_neglog10 <- function(x) {
  -log10(pmax(as.numeric(x), .Machine$double.xmin))
}

slice_max_abs <- function(df, value_col) {
  if(nrow(df) == 0) return(df)
  df %>% slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[value_col]]), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
}

resolve_reads_path <- function(path_value, root_dir) {
  path_value <- trimws(as.character(path_value))
  if(!nzchar(path_value)) return(NA_character_)
  if(grepl("^/", path_value)) {
    normalizePath(path_value, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    normalizePath(file.path(root_dir, path_value), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  }
}

read_reads_info <- function(path, root_dir) {
  if(!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("未找到 reads_info.txt: ", path)
  }

  info <- read.delim(
    path,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    check.names = FALSE
  )

  if(!("sample" %in% colnames(info))) stop("reads_info.txt 缺少 sample 列")
  if(!("group" %in% colnames(info))) stop("reads_info.txt 缺少 group 列")

  if(!("raw_fq1" %in% colnames(info)) && "fq1" %in% colnames(info)) {
    info$raw_fq1 <- info$fq1
  }
  if(!("raw_fq2" %in% colnames(info)) && "fq2" %in% colnames(info)) {
    info$raw_fq2 <- info$fq2
  }
  if(!all(c("raw_fq1", "raw_fq2") %in% colnames(info))) {
    stop("reads_info.txt 缺少 raw_fq1/raw_fq2 列")
  }

  trim_cols <- intersect(c("group_stage", "sample", "group", "stage", "raw_fq1", "raw_fq2"), colnames(info))
  for(col_name in trim_cols) {
    info[[col_name]] <- trimws(as.character(info[[col_name]]))
  }

  if(!("stage" %in% colnames(info))) {
    if("group_stage" %in% colnames(info) && all(grepl("sperm$", info$group_stage, ignore.case = TRUE))) {
      info$stage <- "sperm"
    } else {
      info$stage <- "sperm"
    }
  }
  if(!("group_stage" %in% colnames(info))) {
    info$group_stage <- paste0(info$group, info$stage)
  }

  info <- info %>%
    filter(nzchar(sample) | nzchar(group) | nzchar(raw_fq1) | nzchar(raw_fq2))

  if(any(!nzchar(info$sample))) stop("reads_info.txt 中存在空 sample")
  if(any(!nzchar(info$group))) stop("reads_info.txt 中存在空 group")
  if(any(!nzchar(info$raw_fq1) | !nzchar(info$raw_fq2))) {
    stop("reads_info.txt 中存在缺失 raw_fq1/raw_fq2 的样本")
  }
  if(anyDuplicated(info$sample)) {
    dup_samples <- unique(info$sample[duplicated(info$sample)])
    stop("reads_info.txt 中存在重复 sample: ", paste(dup_samples, collapse = ", "))
  }

  info$raw_fq1_resolved <- vapply(info$raw_fq1, resolve_reads_path, character(1), root_dir = root_dir)
  info$raw_fq2_resolved <- vapply(info$raw_fq2, resolve_reads_path, character(1), root_dir = root_dir)

  group_levels <- unique(info$group)
  if(length(group_levels) != 2) {
    stop("reads_info.txt 必须恰好包含两个分组，当前得到: ", paste(group_levels, collapse = ", "))
  }
  if(any(vapply(group_levels, function(group_name) sum(info$group == group_name), integer(1)) == 0L)) {
    stop("reads_info.txt 中存在没有样本的分组")
  }

  rownames(info) <- info$sample
  info
}

ensure_step_dirs <- function(...) {
  dirs <- unique(unlist(list(...), use.names = FALSE))
  dirs <- dirs[!is.na(dirs) & nzchar(dirs)]
  invisible(lapply(dirs, dir.create, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE))
}

standardize_chr_style <- function(chr_vec, target_has_chr = TRUE) {
  chr_vec <- as.character(chr_vec)
  if(target_has_chr) {
    chr_vec <- ifelse(grepl("^chr", chr_vec), chr_vec, paste0("chr", chr_vec))
  } else {
    chr_vec <- sub("^chr", "", chr_vec)
  }
  chr_vec
}

mouse_main_chr_levels <- function(target_has_chr = TRUE) {
  chr_levels <- c(as.character(1:19), "X", "Y")
  if(target_has_chr) paste0("chr", chr_levels) else chr_levels
}

get_mouse_main_chr_sizes <- function(target_has_chr = TRUE) {
  chr_sizes <- data.frame(
    chr = names(seqlengths(BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39)),
    chr_length = as.numeric(seqlengths(BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39))
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(chr_length), chr %in% mouse_main_chr_levels(TRUE)) %>%
    mutate(chr = if(target_has_chr) chr else sub("^chr", "", chr))

  chr_sizes$chr <- factor(chr_sizes$chr, levels = mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr))
  chr_sizes %>% arrange(chr) %>% mutate(chr = as.character(chr))
}

strip_chr_prefix <- function(chr_vec) {
  sub("^chr", "", as.character(chr_vec))
}

get_txdb_sqlite_paths <- function(gtf_file) {
  full_sqlite <- paste0(gtf_file, ".sqlite")
  list(
    full = full_sqlite,
    main = sub("\\.sqlite$", ".mainchr.sqlite", full_sqlite)
  )
}

filter_df_to_main_chr <- function(df, chr_col = "chr") {
  if(nrow(df) == 0 || !(chr_col %in% colnames(df))) return(df)
  target_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(df[[chr_col]])))
  keep_levels <- mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr = target_has_chr)
  df[[chr_col]] <- standardize_chr_style(df[[chr_col]], target_has_chr = target_has_chr)
  df[df[[chr_col]] %in% keep_levels & !is.na(df[[chr_col]]), , drop = FALSE]
}

filter_gr_to_main_chr <- function(gr) {
  if(length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  target_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(seqnames(gr))))
  keep_levels <- intersect(seqlevels(gr), mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr = target_has_chr))
  if(length(keep_levels) == 0) return(gr[0])
  GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(gr, value = keep_levels, pruning.mode = "coarse")
}

align_gr_to_target_style <- function(gr, target_gr = NULL) {
  if(is.null(gr) || length(gr) == 0) return(gr)
  if(!is.null(target_gr) && length(target_gr) > 0) {
    target_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(seqnames(target_gr))))
    current_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", as.character(seqnames(gr))))
    if(target_has_chr != current_has_chr) {
      seqlevels(gr) <- standardize_chr_style(seqlevels(gr), target_has_chr = target_has_chr)
    }
    gr <- tryCatch({
      seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- seqlevelsStyle(target_gr)[1]
      gr
    }, error = function(e) gr)
  }
  filter_gr_to_main_chr(gr)
}

reference_missing_message <- function(label, path, source_url = NULL) {
  msg <- paste0(
    "未找到 ", label, " 注释文件: ", path,
    "。Rmd 渲染阶段不再自动联网下载参考文件，请先在 reference-prep 或 shell 流程中准备好该文件。"
  )
  if(!is.null(source_url) && nzchar(source_url)) {
    msg <- paste0(msg, " 推荐来源: ", source_url)
  }
  msg
}

read_ucsc_cpg_island_gr <- function(config_arg = config, target_gr = NULL, required = FALSE) {
  cgi_file <- config_arg$cpg_island_file %||% file.path(config_arg$ref_base_dir, "mm39_cpgIslandExt.txt.gz")
  if(!file.exists(cgi_file)) {
    msg <- reference_missing_message(
      "CpG Island",
      cgi_file,
      "https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/mm39/database/cpgIslandExt.txt.gz"
    )
    if(required) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
    message("   ⚠️ ", msg)
    return(NULL)
  }

  cgi_raw <- readr::read_tsv(cgi_file, col_names = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if(ncol(cgi_raw) < 4) {
    stop("CpG Island 注释列数不足，期望 UCSC cpgIslandExt 格式: ", cgi_file, call. = FALSE)
  }

  gr_island <- GRanges(
    seqnames = cgi_raw[[2]],
    ranges = IRanges(start = cgi_raw[[3]] + 1, end = cgi_raw[[4]])
  )
  strand(gr_island) <- "*"
  align_gr_to_target_style(gr_island, target_gr = target_gr)
}

build_cgi_context_regions <- function(gr_island, config_arg = config, target_gr = NULL) {
  gr_island <- align_gr_to_target_style(gr_island, target_gr = target_gr)
  gr_n_shore <- flank(gr_island, width = config_arg$cgi_shore_width, start = TRUE)
  gr_n_shelf <- flank(gr_n_shore, width = config_arg$cgi_shelf_width, start = TRUE)
  gr_s_shore <- flank(gr_island, width = config_arg$cgi_shore_width, start = FALSE)
  gr_s_shelf <- flank(gr_s_shore, width = config_arg$cgi_shelf_width, start = FALSE)

  region_list_cgi <- list(
    "N_Shelf" = gr_n_shelf,
    "N_Shore" = gr_n_shore,
    "Island" = gr_island,
    "S_Shore" = gr_s_shore,
    "S_Shelf" = gr_s_shelf
  )
  region_order <- names(region_list_cgi)
  gr_all_cgi_context <- do.call(c, unname(region_list_cgi))
  mcols(gr_all_cgi_context)$context <- rep(region_order, lengths(region_list_cgi))

  list(
    gr_island = gr_island,
    gr_n_shore = gr_n_shore,
    gr_n_shelf = gr_n_shelf,
    gr_s_shore = gr_s_shore,
    gr_s_shelf = gr_s_shelf,
    region_list_cgi = region_list_cgi,
    region_order_cgi = region_order,
    gr_all_cgi_context = gr_all_cgi_context
  )
}

get_cgi_context_resources <- function(config_arg = config, target_gr = NULL, required = FALSE) {
  gr_island <- read_ucsc_cpg_island_gr(config_arg, target_gr = target_gr, required = required)
  if(is.null(gr_island) || length(gr_island) == 0) {
    if(required) stop("CpG Island 注释为空，无法继续。", call. = FALSE)
    return(NULL)
  }
  c(
    list(cgi_file = config_arg$cpg_island_file),
    build_cgi_context_regions(gr_island, config_arg = config_arg, target_gr = target_gr)
  )
}

resolve_repeatmasker_file <- function(config_arg = config, required = FALSE) {
  candidates <- unique(c(
    config_arg$repeatmasker_file,
    file.path(config_arg$ref_base_dir, config_arg$repeatmasker_candidates)
  ))
  candidates <- candidates[!is.na(candidates) & nzchar(candidates)]
  hit <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if(length(hit) > 0) return(hit[[1]])

  msg <- reference_missing_message(
    "RepeatMasker",
    paste(candidates, collapse = " 或 "),
    "https://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/mm39/database/rmsk.txt.gz"
  )
  if(required) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
  message("   ⚠️ ", msg)
  NA_character_
}

filter_txdb_to_main_chr <- function(txdb) {
  txdb_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", seqlevels(txdb)))
  keep_levels <- intersect(seqlevels(txdb), mouse_main_chr_levels(target_has_chr = txdb_has_chr))
  GenomeInfoDb::keepSeqlevels(txdb, value = keep_levels, pruning.mode = "coarse")
}

load_main_chr_txdb <- function(gtf_file) {
  if(!file.exists(gtf_file)) stop("❌ GTF 文件未找到: ", gtf_file)
  txdb_paths <- get_txdb_sqlite_paths(gtf_file)
  if(file.exists(txdb_paths$main)) {
    return(loadDb(txdb_paths$main))
  }
  if(file.exists(txdb_paths$full)) {
    txdb_raw <- loadDb(txdb_paths$full)
  } else {
    message("   正在从 GTF 构建 TxDb (首次运行较慢)...")
    txdb_raw <- makeTxDbFromGFF(gtf_file)
    saveDb(txdb_raw, txdb_paths$full)
  }
  txdb_main <- filter_txdb_to_main_chr(txdb_raw)
  saveDb(txdb_main, txdb_paths$main)
  txdb_main
}

sample_group_factor <- function(sample_ids, config) {
  group_vec <- rep(NA_character_, length(sample_ids))
  group_vec[config$group1_idx] <- config$group1_name
  group_vec[config$group2_idx] <- config$group2_name
  factor(group_vec, levels = c(config$group1_name, config$group2_name))
}

simplify_repeat_class <- function(rep_class, rep_family = NA_character_) {
  rep_class <- as.character(rep_class)
  rep_family <- as.character(rep_family)
  dplyr::case_when(
    rep_class %in% c("LINE", "SINE", "LTR", "DNA") ~ rep_class,
    rep_class %in% c("Simple_repeat", "Low_complexity", "Satellite") ~ rep_class,
    rep_family %in% c("LINE", "SINE", "LTR", "DNA") ~ rep_family,
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

plot_preview_dpi <- 220

pdf_preview_png_paths <- function(pdf_file) {
  png_base <- sub("(?i)\\.pdf$", "", pdf_file, perl = TRUE)
  c(paste0(png_base, ".png"), Sys.glob(paste0(png_base, "_page_*.png")))
}

save_pdf_preview_pngs <- function(pdf_file, dpi = plot_preview_dpi) {
  if(is.null(pdf_file) || !file.exists(pdf_file) || !grepl("\\.pdf$", pdf_file, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  gs_bin <- Sys.which("gs")
  if(identical(gs_bin, "")) {
    message("Ghostscript 未找到，跳过 PNG 预览导出: ", pdf_file)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  png_base <- sub("(?i)\\.pdf$", "", pdf_file, perl = TRUE)
  png_single <- paste0(png_base, ".png")
  png_pattern <- paste0(png_base, "_page_%02d.png")
  unlink(pdf_preview_png_paths(pdf_file), force = TRUE)

  suppressWarnings(
    system2(
      gs_bin,
      args = c(
        "-dSAFER", "-dBATCH", "-dNOPAUSE",
        "-dTextAlphaBits=4", "-dGraphicsAlphaBits=4",
        "-sDEVICE=png16m",
        paste0("-r", dpi),
        paste0("-sOutputFile=", png_pattern),
        pdf_file
      ),
      stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE
    )
  )

  png_pages <- sort(Sys.glob(paste0(png_base, "_page_*.png")))
  if(length(png_pages) == 1) {
    file.rename(png_pages, png_single)
    return(invisible(png_single))
  }
  invisible(png_pages)
}

.tracked_pdf_devices <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
.tracked_pdf_devices$files <- list()

cairo_pdf <- function(filename, width = 7, height = 7, ...) {
  dir.create(dirname(filename), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  grDevices::cairo_pdf(filename, width = width, height = height, ...)
  .tracked_pdf_devices$files[[as.character(grDevices::dev.cur())]] <- filename
  invisible(grDevices::dev.cur())
}

dev.off <- function(which = grDevices::dev.cur()) {
  which_num <- as.integer(which)
  dev_key <- as.character(which_num)
  pdf_file <- .tracked_pdf_devices$files[[dev_key]]
  result <- grDevices::dev.off(which = which)
  if(!is.null(pdf_file)) {
    .tracked_pdf_devices$files[[dev_key]] <- NULL
    tryCatch(
      save_pdf_preview_pngs(pdf_file),
      error = function(e) message("PNG 预览导出失败: ", basename(pdf_file), " - ", e$message)
    )
  }
  invisible(result)
}

ggsave <- function(filename, plot = ggplot2::last_plot(), device = grDevices::cairo_pdf, ...) {
  dir.create(dirname(filename), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  if(identical(device, cairo_pdf)) {
    device <- grDevices::cairo_pdf
  }
  result <- ggplot2::ggsave(filename = filename, plot = plot, device = device, ...)
  if(grepl("\\.pdf$", filename, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    tryCatch(
      save_pdf_preview_pngs(filename),
      error = function(e) message("PNG 预览导出失败: ", basename(filename), " - ", e$message)
    )
  }
  invisible(result)
}

safe_granges_to_df <- function(gr) {
  if(is.null(gr) || length(gr) == 0) return(tibble())
  if(!methods::is(gr, "GenomicRanges")) {
    return(as_tibble(as.data.frame(gr)))
  }

  base_df <- tibble(
    seqnames = as.character(seqnames(gr)),
    start = start(gr),
    end = end(gr),
    width = width(gr),
    strand = as.character(strand(gr))
  )

  meta_df <- S4Vectors::mcols(gr)
  if(length(meta_df) == 0) return(base_df)

  meta_list <- list()
  for(nm in names(meta_df)) {
    col <- meta_df[[nm]]

    if(is.matrix(col) || is.data.frame(col)) {
      col_mat <- as.matrix(col)
      if(ncol(col_mat) == 1) {
        meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col_mat[, 1])
      } else {
        for(j in seq_len(ncol(col_mat))) {
          sub_nm <- colnames(col_mat)[j]
          if(is.null(sub_nm) || is.na(sub_nm) || sub_nm == "") sub_nm <- paste0("V", j)
          meta_list[[paste0(nm, "_", sub_nm)]] <- as.vector(col_mat[, j])
        }
      }
    } else if(is(col, "Rle")) {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col)
    } else if(is.list(col) && !is.atomic(col)) {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- vapply(col, function(x) {
        if(length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        paste(as.character(x), collapse = ";")
      }, character(1))
    } else {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col)
    }
  }

  bind_cols(base_df, as_tibble(meta_list))
}

draw_pheatmap_pdf <- function(mat, out_pdf, width = 10, height = 8,
                              color = viz_pal$heat_compare, title = "",
                              cluster_rows = nrow(mat) > 1, cluster_cols = ncol(mat) > 1,
                              fontsize_row = NULL, fontsize_col = 10) {
  if(is.null(mat) || length(mat) == 0 || nrow(mat) == 0 || ncol(mat) == 0) {
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }
  mat <- as.matrix(mat)
  suppressWarnings(storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric")
  mat[is.infinite(mat)] <- NA_real_
  keep_rows <- rowSums(is.finite(mat)) > 0
  keep_cols <- colSums(is.finite(mat)) > 0
  if(!all(keep_rows) || !all(keep_cols)) {
    mat <- mat[keep_rows, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
  }
  if(nrow(mat) == 0 || ncol(mat) == 0) {
    message("Heatmap skipped because no finite values remain: ", out_pdf)
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }

  cluster_mat <- mat
  bad_vals <- !is.finite(cluster_mat)
  if(any(bad_vals)) {
    row_medians <- apply(cluster_mat, 1, function(x) {
      finite_x <- x[is.finite(x)]
      if(length(finite_x) == 0) NA_real_ else stats::median(finite_x)
    })
    cluster_mat[bad_vals] <- row_medians[row(cluster_mat)[bad_vals]]
  }
  if(any(!is.finite(cluster_mat))) {
    global_median <- stats::median(cluster_mat[is.finite(cluster_mat)], na.rm = TRUE)
    if(!is.finite(global_median)) global_median <- 0
    cluster_mat[!is.finite(cluster_mat)] <- global_median
  }
  mat_display <- mat
  display_bad <- !is.finite(mat_display)
  if(any(display_bad)) {
    mat_display[display_bad] <- cluster_mat[display_bad]
  }

  cluster_rows_arg <- cluster_rows
  if(isTRUE(cluster_rows) && nrow(mat) > 1) {
    cluster_rows_arg <- tryCatch(
      stats::hclust(stats::dist(cluster_mat)),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Heatmap row clustering skipped for ", basename(out_pdf), ": ", e$message)
        FALSE
      }
    )
  } else if(isTRUE(cluster_rows)) {
    cluster_rows_arg <- FALSE
  }

  cluster_cols_arg <- cluster_cols
  if(isTRUE(cluster_cols) && ncol(mat) > 1) {
    cluster_cols_arg <- tryCatch(
      stats::hclust(stats::dist(t(cluster_mat))),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Heatmap column clustering skipped for ", basename(out_pdf), ": ", e$message)
        FALSE
      }
    )
  } else if(isTRUE(cluster_cols)) {
    cluster_cols_arg <- FALSE
  }

  if(is.null(fontsize_row)) {
    fontsize_row <- if(nrow(mat) > 80) 5 else if(nrow(mat) > 40) 6 else 8
  }
  dir.create(dirname(out_pdf), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  # 显式使用 pheatmap 包，避免被 ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap 掩盖后忽略 filename/width/height。
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat_display,
    cluster_rows = cluster_rows_arg,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols_arg,
    scale = "none",
    color = color,
    na_col = viz_pal$neutral_light,
    main = title,
    filename = out_pdf,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    fontsize_row = fontsize_row,
    fontsize_col = fontsize_col
  )
  tryCatch(
    save_pdf_preview_pngs(out_pdf),
    error = function(e) message("PNG 预览导出失败: ", basename(out_pdf), " - ", e$message)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

draw_complex_heatmap_pdf <- function(ht, out_pdf, width = 10, height = 8) {
  if(is.null(ht)) return(invisible(FALSE))
  dir.create(dirname(out_pdf), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  cairo_pdf(out_pdf, width = width, height = height)
  on.exit(dev.off(), add = TRUE)
  grid::grid.newpage()
  ComplexHeatmap::draw(
    ht,
    newpage = FALSE,
    heatmap_legend_side = "right",
    annotation_legend_side = "right",
    merge_legends = TRUE
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

save_enrichment_compare_heatmap <- function(df, context_col, out_pdf, out_csv = NULL,
                                            title = "", top_n = 25, width = 10, height = 8,
                                            value_col = "pvalue") {
  if(is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !(context_col %in% colnames(df))) return(invisible(NULL))
  if(!("Description" %in% colnames(df)) || !(value_col %in% colnames(df))) return(invisible(NULL))

  heat_df <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(Description), !is.na(.data[[context_col]])) %>%
    mutate(logP = safe_neglog10(.data[[value_col]])) %>%
    filter(is.finite(logP)) %>%
    group_by(.data[[context_col]], Description) %>%
    summarise(logP = max(logP, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Description) %>%
    summarise(max_logP = max(logP, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(max_logP)) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    inner_join(df %>%
                 filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(Description), !is.na(.data[[context_col]])) %>%
                 mutate(logP = safe_neglog10(.data[[value_col]])) %>%
                 filter(is.finite(logP)) %>%
                 group_by(.data[[context_col]], Description) %>%
                 summarise(logP = max(logP, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
               by = "Description") %>%
    select(-max_logP) %>%
    distinct()

  if(nrow(heat_df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  mat_df <- heat_df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = all_of(context_col), values_from = logP, values_fill = 0)

  mat <- as.matrix(mat_df[, setdiff(colnames(mat_df), "Description"), drop = FALSE])
  rownames(mat) <- mat_df$Description

  if(!is.null(out_csv)) {
    write_csv(heat_df, out_csv)
  }

  tryCatch(
    draw_pheatmap_pdf(
      mat = mat,
      out_pdf = out_pdf,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      color = viz_pal$heat_compare,
      title = title,
      cluster_rows = nrow(mat) > 1,
      cluster_cols = ncol(mat) > 1
    ),
    error = function(e) message("Compare heatmap error: ", e$message)
  )

  invisible(mat)
}

build_gsea_plots <- function(rank_vec, prefix, title_prefix, organism = "mmu", plot_prefix = NULL) {
  rank_vec <- rank_vec[is.finite(rank_vec)]
  rank_vec <- sort(rank_vec, decreasing = TRUE)
  if(length(rank_vec) < 10) return(invisible(NULL))

  gene_names <- names(rank_vec)
  if(is.null(gene_names) || any(is.na(gene_names))) return(invisible(NULL))
  if(is.null(plot_prefix)) {
    plot_prefix <- sub("/tables/", "/plots/", prefix)
  }
  dir.create(dirname(prefix), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  dir.create(dirname(plot_prefix), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  message("   Running rank-based GSEA: ", title_prefix)

  gsea_kegg <- tryCatch(
    gseKEGG(geneList = rank_vec, organism = organism, pvalueCutoff = 1, verbose = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  gsea_go <- tryCatch(
    gseGO(geneList = rank_vec, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP",
          pvalueCutoff = 1, verbose = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if(!is.null(gsea_kegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_kegg)) > 0) {
    write_csv(as.data.frame(gsea_kegg), paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_GSEA.csv"))
    gsea_kegg@result <- gsea_kegg@result[gsea_kegg@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
    if(nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_kegg)) > 0) {
      save_gsea_dotplot(gsea_kegg, paste0(plot_prefix, "_KEGG_GSEA_Dotplot.pdf"),
                        paste0(title_prefix, " KEGG GSEA"), showCategory = 15)
    }
  }

  if(!is.null(gsea_go) && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
    write_csv(as.data.frame(gsea_go), paste0(prefix, "_GO_BP_GSEA.csv"))
    gsea_go@result <- gsea_go@result[gsea_go@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
    if(nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
      save_gsea_dotplot(gsea_go, paste0(plot_prefix, "_GO_BP_GSEA_Dotplot.pdf"),
                        paste0(title_prefix, " GO BP GSEA"), showCategory = 15)
    }
  }

  invisible(list(go = gsea_go, kegg = gsea_kegg))
}

safe_granges_to_df <- function(gr) {
  if(is.null(gr) || length(gr) == 0) return(tibble())
  if(!methods::is(gr, "GenomicRanges")) {
    return(as_tibble(as.data.frame(gr)))
  }

  base_df <- tibble(
    seqnames = as.character(seqnames(gr)),
    start = start(gr),
    end = end(gr),
    width = width(gr),
    strand = as.character(strand(gr))
  )

  meta_df <- S4Vectors::mcols(gr)
  if(length(meta_df) == 0) return(base_df)

  meta_list <- list()
  for(nm in names(meta_df)) {
    col <- meta_df[[nm]]

    if(is.matrix(col) || is.data.frame(col)) {
      col_mat <- as.matrix(col)
      if(ncol(col_mat) == 1) {
        meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col_mat[, 1])
      } else {
        for(j in seq_len(ncol(col_mat))) {
          sub_nm <- colnames(col_mat)[j]
          if(is.null(sub_nm) || is.na(sub_nm) || sub_nm == "") sub_nm <- paste0("V", j)
          meta_list[[paste0(nm, "_", sub_nm)]] <- as.vector(col_mat[, j])
        }
      }
    } else if(is(col, "Rle")) {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col)
    } else if(is.list(col) && !is.atomic(col)) {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- vapply(col, function(x) {
        if(length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        paste(as.character(x), collapse = ";")
      }, character(1))
    } else {
      meta_list[[nm]] <- as.vector(col)
    }
  }

  bind_cols(base_df, as_tibble(meta_list))
}

draw_pheatmap_pdf <- function(mat, out_pdf, width = 10, height = 8,
                              color = viz_pal$heat_compare, title = "",
                              cluster_rows = nrow(mat) > 1, cluster_cols = ncol(mat) > 1,
                              fontsize_row = NULL, fontsize_col = 10) {
  if(is.null(mat) || length(mat) == 0 || nrow(mat) == 0 || ncol(mat) == 0) {
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }
  if(is.null(fontsize_row)) {
    fontsize_row <- if(nrow(mat) > 80) 5 else if(nrow(mat) > 40) 6 else 8
  }
  dir.create(dirname(out_pdf), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  # 显式使用 pheatmap 包，避免被 ComplexHeatmap::pheatmap 掩盖后忽略 filename/width/height。
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat,
    cluster_rows = cluster_rows,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
    scale = "none",
    color = color,
    main = title,
    filename = out_pdf,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    fontsize_row = fontsize_row,
    fontsize_col = fontsize_col
  )
  tryCatch(
    save_pdf_preview_pngs(out_pdf),
    error = function(e) message("PNG 预览导出失败: ", basename(out_pdf), " - ", e$message)
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

draw_complex_heatmap_pdf <- function(ht, out_pdf, width = 10, height = 8) {
  if(is.null(ht)) return(invisible(FALSE))
  dir.create(dirname(out_pdf), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  cairo_pdf(out_pdf, width = width, height = height)
  on.exit(dev.off(), add = TRUE)
  grid::grid.newpage()
  ComplexHeatmap::draw(
    ht,
    newpage = FALSE,
    heatmap_legend_side = "right",
    annotation_legend_side = "right",
    merge_legends = TRUE
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 富集绘图统一 helper (配色对齐 rnapost.Rmd)
# ==============================================================================

resolve_named_colors <- function(levels_vec, palette_map, fallback_colors = NULL, default_color = "#D4D9DE") {
  levels_vec <- unique(as.character(levels_vec))
  levels_vec <- levels_vec[!is.na(levels_vec) & levels_vec != ""]
  if(length(levels_vec) == 0) return(setNames(character(0), character(0)))

  cols <- unname(palette_map[levels_vec])
  names(cols) <- levels_vec
  missing_idx <- is.na(cols)
  if(any(missing_idx)) {
    if(is.null(fallback_colors) || length(fallback_colors) == 0) {
      cols[missing_idx] <- default_color
    } else {
      cols[missing_idx] <- rep(unname(fallback_colors), length.out = sum(missing_idx))
    }
  }
  cols
}

resolve_enrichment_category_colors <- function(categories, analysis_type = c("GO", "ORA", "KEGG", "GSEA", "Reactome", "Hallmark")) {
  analysis_type <- match.arg(analysis_type)
  categories <- unique(as.character(categories))
  categories <- categories[!is.na(categories) & categories != ""]
  if (length(categories) == 0) return(setNames(character(0), character(0)))
  go_circle_standard_colors <- c(
    BP = unname(viz_pal$go_category["BP"]),
    CC = unname(viz_pal$go_category["CC"]),
    MF = unname(viz_pal$go_category["MF"]),
    Metabolism = unname(viz_pal$accent["warm"]),
    Signaling = unname(viz_pal$accent["teal"]),
    Disease = unname(viz_pal$accent["peach"]),
    Immune = unname(viz_pal$accent["green"]),
    "Cellular Process" = unname(viz_pal$accent["yellow"]),
    Transport = viz_pal$neutral_dark,
    Development = unname(viz_pal$accent["yellow"]),
    Stress = viz_pal$neutral_mid,
    Mixed = viz_pal$neutral_dark,
    GO = unname(viz_pal$go_category["CC"]),
    KEGG = unname(viz_pal$accent["warm"]),
    Reactome = unname(viz_pal$accent["purple"]),
    Hallmark = unname(viz_pal$accent["teal"])
  )
  color_pool <- c(go_circle_standard_colors, viz_pal$accent, viz_pal$go_category,
                  c(dark = viz_pal$neutral_dark, mid = viz_pal$neutral_mid, light = viz_pal$neutral_light))
  resolve_named_colors(categories, color_pool, default_color = viz_pal$neutral_mid)
}

parse_ratio_value <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x) || trimws(as.character(x)) == "") return(NA_real_)
  ratio_parts <- strsplit(as.character(x), "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  if (length(ratio_parts) == 2) {
    numerator <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ratio_parts[[1]]))
    denominator <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ratio_parts[[2]]))
    if (is.finite(numerator) && is.finite(denominator) && denominator > 0) return(numerator / denominator)
  }
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))[1]
}

build_ora_plot_df <- function(ora_df, top_n = 15, facet_col = NULL) {
  if (is.null(ora_df) || nrow(ora_df) == 0) return(data.frame())
  plot_df <- as.data.frame(ora_df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  plot_df$Description <- as.character(plot_df$Description)
  plot_df$pvalue <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(plot_df$pvalue))
  plot_df$Count <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(plot_df$Count))
  plot_df$ratio_value <- if ("GeneRatio" %in% colnames(plot_df)) {
    vapply(plot_df$GeneRatio, parse_ratio_value, numeric(1))
  } else {
    plot_df$Count
  }
  plot_df$ratio_value[!is.finite(plot_df$ratio_value)] <- plot_df$Count[!is.finite(plot_df$ratio_value)]
  plot_df$size_value <- dplyr::coalesce(plot_df$Count, plot_df$ratio_value, 1)
  plot_df$neg_log10_p <- -log10(dplyr::coalesce(plot_df$pvalue, 1) + 1e-300)

  if (!is.null(facet_col) && facet_col %in% colnames(plot_df)) {
    plot_df <- plot_df %>%
      group_by(.data[[facet_col]]) %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(ratio_value), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
      ungroup()
  } else {
    plot_df <- plot_df %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(ratio_value)) %>%
      slice_head(n = min(top_n, nrow(plot_df)))
  }

  plot_df %>% mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(unique(Description))))
}

ora_axis_label <- function(ora_df) {
  if (!is.null(ora_df) && "GeneRatio" %in% colnames(ora_df)) "Gene ratio" else "Gene count"
}

# 统一 ORA barplot：p 值渐变 + theme_wgbs_bw
save_ora_barplot <- function(ora_df, primary, title_prefix, top_n = 15, facet_col = NULL) {
  plot_df <- build_ora_plot_df(ora_df, top_n = top_n, facet_col = facet_col)
  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Description, y = ratio_value, fill = neg_log10_p)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75, alpha = 0.92) +
    scale_fill_wgbs_ryb()

  if (!is.null(facet_col) && facet_col %in% colnames(plot_df)) {
    p <- p + facet_grid(stats::as.formula(paste(facet_col, "~ .")), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y")
  }

  p <- p +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = title_prefix, x = NULL, y = ora_axis_label(ora_df), fill = "-log10(PValue)") +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

  ggsave(primary, plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
}

# 统一 ORA dotplot：p 值渐变 + theme_wgbs_bw
save_ora_dotplot <- function(ora_df, primary, title_prefix, top_n = 15, facet_col = NULL) {
  plot_df <- build_ora_plot_df(ora_df, top_n = top_n, facet_col = facet_col)
  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = ratio_value, y = Description, size = size_value, color = neg_log10_p)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.88) +
    scale_color_wgbs_ryb() +
    labs(title = title_prefix, x = ora_axis_label(ora_df), y = NULL, size = "Gene count", color = "-log10(PValue)") +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 10)

  if (!is.null(facet_col) && facet_col %in% colnames(plot_df)) {
    p <- p + facet_grid(stats::as.formula(paste(facet_col, "~ .")), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y")
  }

  ggsave(primary, plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
}

# 统一 enrichment treeplot：统一 pvalue 渐变配色 + theme_wgbs_bw
save_enrichment_treeplot <- function(enrich_obj, primary, title_prefix, showCategory = 15) {
  if (is.null(enrich_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrich_obj)) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  enrich_obj <- tryCatch(pairwise_termsim(enrich_obj), error = function(e) {
    message("treeplot pairwise_termsim skipped: ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
  if(is.null(enrich_obj)) return(invisible(NULL))
  p <- tryCatch({
    tp <- enrichplot::treeplot(enrich_obj, showCategory = showCategory)
    # treeplot 内部用 pvalue 映射颜色，用统一渐变替换默认色
    tp + scale_color_wgbs_ryb(guide = guide_colorbar(title = "-log10(pvalue)")) +
      labs(title = title_prefix) +
      theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 10)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("treeplot skipped: ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
  if(is.null(p)) return(invisible(NULL))
  ggsave(primary, plot = p, width = 12, height = 10, device = cairo_pdf)
}

# 统一 enrichment cnetplot
save_enrichment_cnetplot <- function(enrich_obj, geneList, primary, title_prefix, showCategory = 5) {
  if (is.null(enrich_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrich_obj)) < showCategory) return(invisible(NULL))
  tryCatch({
    p <- cnetplot(enrich_obj, foldChange = geneList, showCategory = showCategory, node_label = "category") +
      labs(title = title_prefix) +
      theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 10)
    ggsave(primary, plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
  }, error = function(e) message("cnetplot error: ", e$message))
}

# GOplot 输入数据构建 (复用 rnapost 逻辑)
build_goplot_inputs <- function(enrich_df, geneList, category_label = "BP", top_n = 10) {
  if (is.null(enrich_df) || nrow(enrich_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  # 如果有 ONTOLOGY 列，按实际 ontology 映射 category；否则用 category_label
  if ("ONTOLOGY" %in% colnames(enrich_df)) {
    enrich_df$category <- enrich_df$ONTOLOGY
  } else {
    enrich_df$category <- category_label
  }

  enrich_top <- enrich_df %>%
    arrange(pvalue) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, pvalue, geneID, category)

  if (nrow(enrich_top) == 0) return(NULL)

  goenrichment <- enrich_top
  colnames(goenrichment)[colnames(goenrichment) == "pvalue"] <- "adj_pval"
  goenrichment <- goenrichment[, c("category", "ID", "Description", "adj_pval", "geneID")]
  colnames(goenrichment) <- c("category", "ID", "term", "adj_pval", "genes")
  goenrichment$genes <- gsub("/", ",", goenrichment$genes)

  genedata <- data.frame(ID = toupper(names(geneList)), logFC = as.numeric(geneList), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  genedata <- genedata[!is.na(genedata$ID) & genedata$ID != "" & is.finite(genedata$logFC), ]
  genedata <- distinct(genedata, ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

  circ <- tryCatch(circle_dat(goenrichment, genedata), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(circ) || nrow(circ) == 0) return(NULL)

  list(goenrichment = goenrichment, genedata = genedata, circ = circ)
}

# GOChord + GOCluster 统一出图 bundle（参考 rna.Rmd 逻辑）
save_go_goplot_bundle <- function(goplot_inputs, out_chord, out_cluster, title_suffix = "") {
  if (is.null(goplot_inputs)) return(invisible(NULL))
  circ <- goplot_inputs$circ
  goenrichment <- goplot_inputs$goenrichment

  # lfc.col 顺序：正logFC → 零 → 负logFC（与 rna.Rmd 一致）
  lfc_colors <- unname(c(viz_pal$de["up"], viz_pal$neutral_light, viz_pal$de["down"]))

  # ribbon 配色种子：从核心色板取多种颜色，不够时 colorRampPalette 扩展
  ribbon_palette_seed <- c(
    unname(viz_pal$group),   # group1蓝, group2红
    unname(viz_pal$accent),  # warm橙, teal青, peach桃
    "#9B8EC4", "#7BC5A0", "#E8D9A0"  # 紫, 绿, 黄
  )

  # 筛选 top 基因构建 chord 数据
  max_genes_to_show <- 20
  circ$abs_logFC <- abs(circ$logFC)
  circ <- circ[order(circ$abs_logFC, decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  top_genes <- unique(circ$genes)[seq_len(min(length(unique(circ$genes)), max_genes_to_show))]
  circ_filtered <- circ[circ$genes %in% top_genes, , drop = FALSE]
  genedata_filtered <- goplot_inputs$genedata[goplot_inputs$genedata$ID %in% top_genes, , drop = FALSE]
  chord <- tryCatch(chord_dat(data = circ_filtered, genes = genedata_filtered), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(chord) || nrow(chord) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  # --- Chord Plot ---
  tryCatch({
    process_cols <- setdiff(colnames(chord), "logFC")
    ribbon_col <- if (length(process_cols) > 0) {
      if (length(process_cols) <= length(ribbon_palette_seed)) {
        ribbon_palette_seed[seq_len(length(process_cols))]
      } else {
        colorRampPalette(ribbon_palette_seed)(length(process_cols))
      }
    } else {
      unname(viz_pal$de["up"])
    }

    cairo_pdf(out_chord, width = 14, height = 12)
    print(GOChord(
      data = chord, title = paste0("GO Chord ", title_suffix),
      space = 0.02, gene.order = "logFC", gene.space = 0.25, gene.size = 3.5,
      lfc.col = lfc_colors, ribbon.col = ribbon_col,
      border.size = 0.25, process.label = 10, limit = c(0, 0)
    ))
    dev.off()
  }, error = function(e) message("GOChord error: ", e$message))

  # --- Cluster Plot ---
  tryCatch({
    terms_to_cluster <- intersect(unique(goenrichment$term), colnames(chord))
    if (length(terms_to_cluster) < 2) return(invisible(NULL))

    # GOCluster 在函数环境中直接查找 chord，需显式注入
    gocluster_fun <- GOCluster
    environment(gocluster_fun) <- list2env(
      list(chord = chord),
      parent = environment(GOCluster)
    )

    cairo_pdf(out_cluster, width = 16, height = 10)
    print(gocluster_fun(chord, terms_to_cluster) + labs(title = paste0("GO Cluster ", title_suffix)))
    dev.off()
  }, error = function(e) message("GOCluster error: ", e$message))
}

append_context_column <- function(df, context_col = NULL, context_name = NULL) {
  df <- as_tibble(df)
  if(!is.null(context_col) && !is.null(context_name) && nzchar(context_col)) {
    df[[context_col]] <- context_name
  }
  df
}

write_enrichment_table <- function(df, path, context_col = NULL, context_name = NULL) {
  df <- append_context_column(df, context_col = context_col, context_name = context_name)
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  write_csv(df, path)
  invisible(df)
}

enrichment_context_slug <- function(context_name) {
  gsub("[^[:alnum:]_-]+", "_", as.character(context_name))
}

prepare_enrichment_gene_input <- function(df, gene_col = "gene_id_clean", score_col = "log2FoldChange") {
  if(is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  if(!all(c(gene_col, score_col) %in% colnames(df))) return(NULL)

  gene_df <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[gene_col]]), .data[[gene_col]] != "", is.finite(.data[[score_col]])) %>%
    group_by(.data[[gene_col]]) %>%
    summarise(score = first(.data[[score_col]]), .groups = "drop")
  colnames(gene_df)[colnames(gene_df) == gene_col] <- "gene_id_clean"
  if(nrow(gene_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  gene_map <- tryCatch(
    bitr(gene_df$gene_id_clean, fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"), OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db),
    error = function(e) {
      message("ID mapping failed: ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
  if(is.null(gene_map) || nrow(gene_map) == 0) return(NULL)

  gene_df_final <- inner_join(gene_df, gene_map, by = c("gene_id_clean" = "ENSEMBL")) %>%
    filter(!is.na(ENTREZID), ENTREZID != "", !is.na(SYMBOL), SYMBOL != "") %>%
    distinct(gene_id_clean, .keep_all = TRUE)
  if(nrow(gene_df_final) == 0) return(NULL)

  geneList <- gene_df_final$score
  names(geneList) <- gene_df_final$SYMBOL
  geneList <- sort(geneList[is.finite(geneList)], decreasing = TRUE)
  sig_genes <- unique(gene_df_final$ENTREZID)
  sig_genes <- sig_genes[!is.na(sig_genes) & sig_genes != ""]
  if(length(sig_genes) == 0 || length(geneList) == 0) return(NULL)

  list(gene_df = gene_df_final, geneList = geneList, sig_genes = sig_genes)
}

filter_enrichment_object <- function(enrich_obj, p_threshold = config$enrichment_p_threshold) {
  if(is.null(enrich_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrich_obj)) == 0) return(NULL)
  sig_df <- as.data.frame(enrich_obj) %>% filter(!is.na(pvalue), pvalue < p_threshold)
  sig_df <- as.data.frame(sig_df)
  enrich_obj@result <- sig_df
  enrich_obj
}

run_kegg_ora_bundle <- function(sig_genes, geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                                file_prefix = "", context_col = NULL,
                                p_threshold = config$enrichment_p_threshold) {
  safe_context <- enrichment_context_slug(context_name)
  out_prefix <- file.path(table_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "kegg_", safe_context))
  ekegg <- tryCatch(
    enrichKEGG(gene = sig_genes, organism = "mmu", pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1),
    error = function(e) {
      message("KEGG Error in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
  if(is.null(ekegg) || nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) == 0) return(NULL)

  ekegg <- tryCatch(setReadable(ekegg, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID"), error = function(e) ekegg)
  write_enrichment_table(as.data.frame(ekegg), paste0(out_prefix, ".csv"),
                         context_col = context_col, context_name = context_name)

  ekegg_sig <- filter_enrichment_object(ekegg, p_threshold = p_threshold)
  if(is.null(ekegg_sig) || nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg_sig)) == 0) return(NULL)
  write_enrichment_table(as.data.frame(ekegg_sig), paste0(out_prefix, "_p_lt_0_05.csv"),
                         context_col = context_col, context_name = context_name)

  save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(ekegg_sig), file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "kegg_", safe_context, "_barplot.pdf")),
                   paste("KEGG", context_name), top_n = config$enrichment_top_n_kegg)
  save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(ekegg_sig), file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "kegg_", safe_context, "_dotplot.pdf")),
                   paste("KEGG", context_name), top_n = config$enrichment_top_n_kegg)
  save_enrichment_cnetplot(ekegg_sig, geneList,
                           file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "kegg_", safe_context, "_cnetplot.pdf")),
                           paste("KEGG", context_name), showCategory = config$enrichment_cnet_show_category)
  ekegg_sig
}

run_go_ora_bundle <- function(sig_genes, geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                              ont = c("BP", "MF", "CC", "ALL"), file_prefix = "",
                              context_col = NULL, p_threshold = config$enrichment_p_threshold,
                              theme_regex = NULL, theme_label = "theme") {
  ont <- match.arg(ont)
  safe_context <- enrichment_context_slug(context_name)
  ont_lower <- tolower(ont)
  out_prefix <- file.path(table_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context))
  go_obj <- tryCatch(
    enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID",
             ont = ont, pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE),
    error = function(e) {
      message("GO ", ont, " Error in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
  if(is.null(go_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(go_obj)) == 0) return(NULL)

  write_enrichment_table(as.data.frame(go_obj), paste0(out_prefix, ".csv"),
                         context_col = context_col, context_name = context_name)

  go_sig <- filter_enrichment_object(go_obj, p_threshold = p_threshold)
  if(is.null(go_sig) || nrow(as.data.frame(go_sig)) == 0) return(NULL)
  go_sig_df <- write_enrichment_table(as.data.frame(go_sig), paste0(out_prefix, "_p_lt_0_05.csv"),
                                      context_col = context_col, context_name = context_name)

  if(!is.null(theme_regex) && nzchar(theme_regex) && "Description" %in% colnames(go_sig_df)) {
    theme_df <- go_sig_df %>%
      filter(grepl(theme_regex, Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
    write_csv(theme_df, paste0(out_prefix, "_", theme_label, "_p_lt_0_05.csv"))
  }

  if(ont %in% c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
    tryCatch(
      save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(go_sig), file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context, "_barplot.pdf")),
                       paste("GO", ont, context_name), top_n = config$enrichment_top_n_go),
      error = function(e) message("GO ", ont, " barplot skipped in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
    )
    tryCatch(
      save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(go_sig), file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context, "_dotplot.pdf")),
                       paste("GO", ont, context_name), top_n = config$enrichment_top_n_go),
      error = function(e) message("GO ", ont, " dotplot skipped in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
    )
    tryCatch(
      save_enrichment_treeplot(go_sig, file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context, "_treeplot.pdf")),
                               paste("GO", ont, context_name), showCategory = config$enrichment_tree_show_category),
      error = function(e) message("GO ", ont, " treeplot skipped in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
    )
  }
  if(ont == "BP") {
    tryCatch(
      save_enrichment_cnetplot(go_sig, geneList,
                               file.path(plot_dir, paste0(file_prefix, "go_bp_", safe_context, "_cnetplot.pdf")),
                               paste("GO BP", context_name), showCategory = config$enrichment_cnet_show_category),
      error = function(e) message("GO BP cnetplot skipped in ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
    )
  }
  if(ont %in% c("BP", "ALL")) {
    tryCatch(
      {
        gp_inputs <- build_goplot_inputs(as.data.frame(go_sig), geneList, category_label = ont, top_n = config$enrichment_goplot_top_n)
        save_go_goplot_bundle(
          gp_inputs,
          file.path(plot_dir, paste0("go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context, "_chord.pdf")),
          file.path(plot_dir, paste0("go_", ont_lower, "_", safe_context, "_cluster.pdf")),
          title_suffix = paste(ont, context_name)
        )
      },
      error = function(e) message("GOplot bundle skipped in ", ont, " ", context_name, ": ", e$message)
    )
  }

  go_sig
}

run_ora_enrichment_bundle <- function(input_df, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                                      file_prefix = "", context_col = NULL,
                                      p_threshold = config$enrichment_p_threshold,
                                      theme_regex = NULL, theme_label = "theme",
                                      filter_expr = NULL) {
  ensure_step_dirs(plot_dir, table_dir)
  if(!is.null(filter_expr)) {
    input_df <- input_df %>% filter({{ filter_expr }})
  }
  gene_input <- prepare_enrichment_gene_input(input_df)
  if(is.null(gene_input)) {
    message("   ⚠️ ", context_name, " 可用于富集的基因不足，跳过。")
    return(NULL)
  }

  list(
    gene_df = gene_input$gene_df,
    kegg = run_kegg_ora_bundle(gene_input$sig_genes, gene_input$geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                               file_prefix = file_prefix, context_col = context_col, p_threshold = p_threshold),
    go_bp = run_go_ora_bundle(gene_input$sig_genes, gene_input$geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                              ont = "BP", file_prefix = file_prefix, context_col = context_col,
                              p_threshold = p_threshold, theme_regex = theme_regex, theme_label = theme_label),
    go_mf = run_go_ora_bundle(gene_input$sig_genes, gene_input$geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                              ont = "MF", file_prefix = file_prefix, context_col = context_col,
                              p_threshold = p_threshold, theme_regex = theme_regex, theme_label = theme_label),
    go_cc = run_go_ora_bundle(gene_input$sig_genes, gene_input$geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                              ont = "CC", file_prefix = file_prefix, context_col = context_col,
                              p_threshold = p_threshold, theme_regex = theme_regex, theme_label = theme_label),
    go_all = run_go_ora_bundle(gene_input$sig_genes, gene_input$geneList, context_name, plot_dir, table_dir,
                               ont = "ALL", file_prefix = file_prefix, context_col = context_col,
                               p_threshold = p_threshold, theme_regex = theme_regex, theme_label = theme_label)
  )
}

# 统一 GSEA dotplot helper：p 值渐变 + theme_wgbs_bw
save_gsea_dotplot <- function(gsea_obj, primary, title_prefix, showCategory = 15) {
  if (is.null(gsea_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_obj)) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  gsea_df <- as.data.frame(gsea_obj)
  if (!"pvalue" %in% colnames(gsea_df)) return(invisible(NULL))

  gsea_df <- gsea_df %>% arrange(pvalue, desc(abs(NES))) %>% slice_head(n = min(showCategory, nrow(gsea_df)))
  if (nrow(gsea_df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  gsea_df$Description <- factor(gsea_df$Description, levels = rev(unique(gsea_df$Description)))
  gsea_df$neg_log10_p <- -log10(gsea_df$pvalue + 1e-300)

  p <- ggplot(gsea_df, aes(x = NES, y = Description, size = abs(NES), color = neg_log10_p)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.88) +
    scale_color_wgbs_ryb() +
    labs(title = title_prefix, x = "NES", y = NULL, size = "|NES|", color = "-log10(PValue)") +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 10)

  ggsave(primary, plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
}

assign_sample_ids_to_obj <- function(obj_list, sample_ids) {
  if(length(obj_list) != length(sample_ids)) {
    stop(
      "CpG.RData 样本数与 reads_info 不一致: ",
      length(obj_list), " vs ", length(sample_ids)
    )
  }
  for(i in seq_along(obj_list)) {
    obj_list[[i]]@sample.id <- sample_ids[i]
  }
  obj_list
}

standardize_dmr_result_columns <- function(dmr_df) {
  if(!("diffMethy" %in% colnames(dmr_df)) && "diff.Methy" %in% colnames(dmr_df)) {
    dmr_df$diffMethy <- dmr_df$diff.Methy
  }
  if(!("diff.Methy" %in% colnames(dmr_df)) && "diffMethy" %in% colnames(dmr_df)) {
    dmr_df$diff.Methy <- dmr_df$diffMethy
  }

  if(!("meanMethy_group1" %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
    source_col <- first_existing_col(dmr_df, c("meanMethy1"))
    dmr_df$meanMethy_group1 <- if(!is.na(source_col)) dmr_df[[source_col]] else NA_real_
  }
  if(!("meanMethy_group2" %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
    source_col <- first_existing_col(dmr_df, c("meanMethy2"))
    dmr_df$meanMethy_group2 <- if(!is.na(source_col)) dmr_df[[source_col]] else NA_real_
  }

  if(!("group1_label" %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
    dmr_df$group1_label <- config$group1_name
  } else {
    dmr_df$group1_label[is.na(dmr_df$group1_label) | dmr_df$group1_label == ""] <- config$group1_name
  }
  if(!("group2_label" %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
    dmr_df$group2_label <- config$group2_name
  } else {
    dmr_df$group2_label[is.na(dmr_df$group2_label) | dmr_df$group2_label == ""] <- config$group2_name
  }

  if("diff.Methy" %in% colnames(dmr_df)) {
    dmr_df$diffMethy <- dmr_df$diff.Methy
  } else if(all(c("meanMethy_group1", "meanMethy_group2") %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
    dmr_df$diff.Methy <- dmr_df$meanMethy_group2 - dmr_df$meanMethy_group1
    dmr_df$diffMethy <- dmr_df$diff.Methy
  }

  dmr_df
}

read_expr_results <- function(file) {
  if(grepl("\\.csv$", file, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    expr_df <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  } else {
    expr_df <- read_tsv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  }
  required_cols <- c("log2FoldChange", "pvalue")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(expr_df))
  if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("RNA-seq 结果缺少必要列: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), call. = FALSE)
  }
  if(all(c("sampleA", "sampleB") %in% colnames(expr_df)) &&
     !is.null(config$group1_name) && !is.null(config$group2_name)) {
    rna_sample_a <- unique(na.omit(as.character(expr_df$sampleA)))
    rna_sample_b <- unique(na.omit(as.character(expr_df$sampleB)))
    expected_a <- config$group2_name
    expected_b <- config$group1_name
    if(length(rna_sample_a) == 1 && length(rna_sample_b) == 1) {
      same_direction <- identical(tolower(rna_sample_a), tolower(expected_a)) &&
        identical(tolower(rna_sample_b), tolower(expected_b))
      if(!same_direction) {
        stop(
          "RNA-seq 对比方向与 WGBS 方向不一致。WGBS diffMethy 为 ",
          expected_a, " - ", expected_b,
          "，但 RNA 文件为 ", rna_sample_a, " - ", rna_sample_b,
          "。请先确认 RNA log2FoldChange 方向，避免四象限解释反向。",
          call. = FALSE
        )
      }
      expr_df$rna_contrast <- paste(rna_sample_a, rna_sample_b, sep = "_vs_")
    } else {
      warning("RNA-seq 文件 sampleA/sampleB 不唯一，无法自动验证 log2FoldChange 对比方向。", call. = FALSE)
    }
  } else {
    warning("RNA-seq 文件缺少 sampleA/sampleB，无法自动验证 log2FoldChange 对比方向。", call. = FALSE)
  }
  if(!("gene_id_clean" %in% colnames(expr_df))) {
    if("gene_id" %in% colnames(expr_df)) {
      expr_df$gene_id_clean <- str_replace(expr_df$gene_id, "\\..*$", "")
    } else {
      expr_df$gene_id_clean <- str_replace(rownames(expr_df), "\\..*$", "")
    }
  }
  for(col in intersect(c("SYMBOL", "ENTREZID", "GENENAME"), colnames(expr_df))) {
    colnames(expr_df)[colnames(expr_df) == col] <- paste0("RNA_", col)
  }
  expr_df
}

feature_levels_main <- c("Promoter", "UTR", "Exon", "Intron", "Downstream", "Intergenic", "Other")
feature_layer_levels <- c("Promoter", "Gene Body", "Distal", "Other")
profile_segment_levels <- c("Upstream", "5' UTR", "Exon", "Intron", "3' UTR", "Downstream")
profile_segment_to_feature <- c(
  "Upstream" = "Promoter",
  "5' UTR" = "UTR",
  "Exon" = "Exon",
  "Intron" = "Intron",
  "3' UTR" = "UTR",
  "Downstream" = "Downstream"
)

# feature 与 profile segment 是两套不同概念:
# 1) feature_levels_main: DMR 注释后真正归类的基因组元件
# 2) profile_segment_levels: metagene/transcript profile 画图时沿转录本切分的连续区段
# 两者名称不同，但颜色会映射回同一套 feature 语义，保证前后图形口径一致。

normalize_feature_label <- function(feature_vec) {
  feature_vec <- as.character(feature_vec)
  feature_vec <- str_replace(feature_vec, " \\(.*", "")
  case_when(
    is.na(feature_vec) | feature_vec == "" ~ "Other",
    grepl("^Promoter|^Upstream$", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Promoter",
    grepl("UTR", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "UTR",
    grepl("Exon", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Exon",
    grepl("Intron", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Intron",
    grepl("Downstream", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Downstream",
    grepl("Distal Intergenic|Intergenic|^Distal$", feature_vec, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Intergenic",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

derive_feature_layer <- function(feature_vec) {
  feature_simple <- normalize_feature_label(feature_vec)
  case_when(
    feature_simple == "Promoter" ~ "Promoter",
    feature_simple %in% c("UTR", "Exon", "Intron") ~ "Gene Body",
    feature_simple %in% c("Downstream", "Intergenic") ~ "Distal",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 按需加载函数 (替代原 readRDS 机制)
# ==============================================================================
# 拆分后各步骤共享全局环境，以下函数仅在对象缺失时按需恢复。

ensure_obj_cpg_loaded <- function() {
  if(!exists('obj.cpg', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    rdata_full_path <- file.path(config$work_dir, config$input_rdata)
    if(!file.exists(rdata_full_path)) {
      stop("\u274c RData 未找到: ", rdata_full_path)
    }
    message("\u23f3 按需重载 obj.cpg: ", rdata_full_path)
    tmp_env <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
    load(rdata_full_path, envir = tmp_env)
    if(!exists('obj.cpg', envir = tmp_env, inherits = FALSE)) {
      stop("\u274c RData 中未找到 obj.cpg")
    }
    assign('obj.cpg', assign_sample_ids_to_obj(get('obj.cpg', envir = tmp_env), sample_ids), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  invisible(get('obj.cpg', envir = .GlobalEnv))
}

ensure_meth_loaded <- function() {
  if(!exists('meth', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
    message("\u23f3 按需构建 methylKit unite 对象...")
    assign('meth', methylKit::unite(get('obj.cpg', envir = .GlobalEnv), destrand = FALSE), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  invisible(get('meth', envir = .GlobalEnv))
}

build_sample_methylation_dt <- function(obj_list, sample_ids, config) {
  if(!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("❌ 需要 data.table 来构建全局甲基化 profile 输入")
  }
  group_vec <- as.character(sample_group_factor(sample_ids, config))
  if(any(is.na(group_vec))) {
    stop("❌ 样本分组信息不完整，无法构建全局甲基化 profile 输入")
  }
  data.table::rbindlist(lapply(seq_along(obj_list), function(i) {
    raw_df <- methylKit::getData(obj_list[[i]])
    required_cols <- c("chr", "start", "end", "strand", "coverage", "numCs")
    missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(raw_df))
    if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
      stop("❌ methylRaw 缺少列: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
    }
    dt <- data.table::as.data.table(raw_df[, required_cols])
    dt <- dt[coverage > 0]
    dt[, Methylation := 100 * numCs / coverage]
    dt[, Sample := sample_ids[[i]]]
    dt[, Group := group_vec[[i]]]
    dt[
      is.finite(Methylation),
      .(chr, start, end, strand, Sample, Group, Methylation)
    ]
  }), use.names = TRUE)
}

build_group_mean_methyl_gr <- function(obj_list = NULL, sample_ids_arg = NULL, config_arg = NULL, meth_raw_dt = NULL) {
  if(!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("❌ 需要 data.table 来构建组均值甲基化 GRanges")
  }
  if(is.null(sample_ids_arg)) {
    sample_ids_arg <- get("sample_ids", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  if(is.null(config_arg)) {
    config_arg <- get("config", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  if(is.null(meth_raw_dt)) {
    if(is.null(obj_list)) {
      ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
      obj_list <- get("obj.cpg", envir = .GlobalEnv)
    }
    meth_raw_dt <- build_sample_methylation_dt(obj_list, sample_ids_arg, config_arg)
  }
  group_cols <- c(config_arg$group1_name, config_arg$group2_name)
  group_mean_long <- meth_raw_dt[
    ,
    .(Methylation = mean(Methylation, na.rm = TRUE)),
    by = .(chr, start, end, strand, Group)
  ]
  group_mean_wide <- data.table::dcast(
    group_mean_long,
    chr + start + end + strand ~ Group,
    value.var = "Methylation"
  )
  for(group_col in group_cols) {
    if(!group_col %in% colnames(group_mean_wide)) {
      group_mean_wide[, (group_col) := NA_real_]
    }
  }
  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = group_mean_wide$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = group_mean_wide$start, end = group_mean_wide$end),
    strand = group_mean_wide$strand
  )
  mcols(gr) <- DataFrame(as.data.frame(group_mean_wide[, ..group_cols]))
  filter_gr_to_main_chr(gr)
}

build_region_sample_methylation <- function(obj_list, region_gr, sample_ids_arg = NULL, config_arg = NULL,
                                            region_ids = NULL, ignore.strand = TRUE) {
  if(is.null(sample_ids_arg)) {
    sample_ids_arg <- get("sample_ids", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  if(is.null(config_arg)) {
    config_arg <- get("config", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  if(length(region_gr) == 0) {
    empty_mat <- matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = length(sample_ids_arg))
    colnames(empty_mat) <- sample_ids_arg
    return(list(matrix = empty_mat, support = tibble(), long = tibble()))
  }
  if(is.null(region_ids)) {
    if(!is.null(names(region_gr)) && any(nzchar(names(region_gr)))) {
      region_ids <- names(region_gr)
    } else if("DMR_id" %in% colnames(as.data.frame(mcols(region_gr)))) {
      region_ids <- as.character(mcols(region_gr)$DMR_id)
    } else {
      region_ids <- paste(as.character(seqnames(region_gr)), start(region_gr), end(region_gr), sep = ":")
    }
  }
  region_ids <- make.unique(as.character(region_ids))
  names(region_gr) <- region_ids
  group_vec <- as.character(sample_group_factor(sample_ids_arg, config_arg))
  sample_group_df <- tibble(Sample = sample_ids_arg, Group = group_vec)
  region_df <- tibble(RegionID = region_ids, RegionIndex = seq_along(region_ids))

  region_meth_long <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(obj_list), function(i) {
    raw_df <- methylKit::getData(obj_list[[i]])
    required_cols <- c("chr", "start", "end", "strand", "coverage", "numCs")
    missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(raw_df))
    if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
      stop("❌ methylRaw 缺少列: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
    }
    raw_df <- raw_df[raw_df$coverage > 0, required_cols, drop = FALSE]
    if(nrow(raw_df) == 0) {
      return(tibble())
    }
    sample_gr <- GRanges(
      seqnames = raw_df$chr,
      ranges = IRanges(start = raw_df$start, end = raw_df$end),
      strand = raw_df$strand
    )
    tryCatch({
      seqlevelsStyle(sample_gr) <- seqlevelsStyle(region_gr)[1]
    }, error = function(e) {})
    ov <- findOverlaps(region_gr, sample_gr, ignore.strand = ignore.strand)
    if(length(ov) == 0) {
      return(tibble())
    }
    tibble(
      RegionID = region_ids[queryHits(ov)],
      Sample = sample_ids_arg[[i]],
      Group = group_vec[[i]],
      Coverage = raw_df$coverage[subjectHits(ov)],
      NumCs = raw_df$numCs[subjectHits(ov)],
      CpG_id = paste(as.character(seqnames(sample_gr))[subjectHits(ov)], start(sample_gr)[subjectHits(ov)], sep = ":")
    ) %>%
      group_by(RegionID, Sample, Group) %>%
      summarise(
        Coverage = sum(Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
        NumCs = sum(NumCs, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_cpg_records = n(),
        n_cpg_sites = n_distinct(CpG_id),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(Methylation = ifelse(Coverage > 0, 100 * NumCs / Coverage, NA_real_))
  }))

  support_df <- expand_grid(RegionID = region_ids, Sample = sample_ids_arg) %>%
    left_join(region_df, by = "RegionID") %>%
    left_join(sample_group_df, by = "Sample") %>%
    left_join(region_meth_long, by = c("RegionID", "Sample", "Group")) %>%
    mutate(
      Coverage = replace_na(Coverage, 0),
      NumCs = replace_na(NumCs, 0),
      n_cpg_records = replace_na(n_cpg_records, 0L),
      n_cpg_sites = replace_na(n_cpg_sites, 0L),
      Methylation = ifelse(Coverage > 0, Methylation, NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    arrange(RegionIndex, match(Sample, sample_ids_arg))

  mat_df <- support_df %>%
    select(RegionID, Sample, Methylation) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Sample, values_from = Methylation)
  mat <- as.matrix(mat_df[, sample_ids_arg, drop = FALSE])
  rownames(mat) <- mat_df$RegionID

  list(matrix = mat, support = support_df, long = region_meth_long)
}

build_wgbs_gene_universe <- function(obj_list = NULL, sample_ids_arg = NULL, config_arg = NULL,
                                     txdb_arg = NULL, min_groups = 1L, min_samples = 1L,
                                     cache_file = NULL) {
  if(!is.null(cache_file) && file.exists(cache_file)) {
    return(read_csv(cache_file, show_col_types = FALSE))
  }
  if(!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("❌ 需要 data.table 来构建 WGBS gene universe")
  }
  if(is.null(obj_list)) {
    ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
    obj_list <- get("obj.cpg", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  if(is.null(sample_ids_arg)) sample_ids_arg <- get("sample_ids", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  if(is.null(config_arg)) config_arg <- get("config", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  if(is.null(txdb_arg)) txdb_arg <- load_main_chr_txdb(config_arg$gtf_file)

  if(min_samples <= 1L && min_groups <= 1L) {
    cpg_support <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(obj_list, function(x) {
      raw_df <- methylKit::getData(x)
      unique(data.table::data.table(
        chr = as.character(raw_df$chr),
        start = as.integer(raw_df$start)
      ))
    }), use.names = TRUE)
    cpg_support <- unique(cpg_support)
  } else {
    group_vec <- as.character(sample_group_factor(sample_ids_arg, config_arg))
    cpg_support <- data.table::rbindlist(lapply(seq_along(obj_list), function(i) {
      raw_df <- methylKit::getData(obj_list[[i]])
      data.table::data.table(
        chr = as.character(raw_df$chr),
        start = as.integer(raw_df$start),
        Sample = sample_ids_arg[[i]],
        Group = group_vec[[i]]
      )
    }), use.names = TRUE)[
      ,
      .(
        n_samples = data.table::uniqueN(Sample),
        n_groups = data.table::uniqueN(Group)
      ),
      by = .(chr, start)
    ][n_samples >= min_samples & n_groups >= min_groups]
  }

  if(nrow(cpg_support) == 0) {
    universe_df <- tibble(gene_id_clean = character(), ENTREZID = character(), SYMBOL = character())
    if(!is.null(cache_file)) write_csv(universe_df, cache_file)
    return(universe_df)
  }

  cpg_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = cpg_support$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = cpg_support$start, width = 1)
  )
  cpg_gr <- filter_gr_to_main_chr(cpg_gr)

  gene_gr <- genes(txdb_arg)
  gene_gr <- filter_gr_to_main_chr(gene_gr)
  tryCatch({
    seqlevelsStyle(cpg_gr) <- seqlevelsStyle(gene_gr)[1]
  }, error = function(e) {})

  ov <- findOverlaps(cpg_gr, gene_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  gene_ids <- unique(names(gene_gr)[subjectHits(ov)])
  gene_ids <- gene_ids[!is.na(gene_ids) & nzchar(gene_ids)]
  gene_ids_clean <- str_replace(gene_ids, "\\..*$", "")

  gene_map <- tryCatch({
    bitr(gene_ids_clean, fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"), OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  if(is.null(gene_map) || nrow(gene_map) == 0) {
    universe_df <- tibble(gene_id_clean = gene_ids_clean, ENTREZID = NA_character_, SYMBOL = NA_character_)
  } else {
    universe_df <- tibble(gene_id_clean = gene_ids_clean) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      inner_join(gene_map, by = c("gene_id_clean" = "ENSEMBL")) %>%
      distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }

  if(!is.null(cache_file)) {
    dir.create(dirname(cache_file), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    write_csv(universe_df, cache_file)
  }
  universe_df
}

ensure_dmr_outputs_loaded <- function() {
  if(!exists('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    dmr_anno_file <- file.path(config$work_dir, "result/3_dmr/tables/2/dmr_annotated.csv")
    if(!file.exists(dmr_anno_file)) {
      stop("❌ DMR 注释文件未找到: ", dmr_anno_file)
    }
    message("⏳ 按需恢复 dmr_anno_df: ", dmr_anno_file)
    assign('dmr_anno_df', standardize_dmr_result_columns(read_csv(dmr_anno_file, show_col_types = FALSE)), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }

  if(!exists('dmrs', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    dmr_raw_file <- file.path(config$work_dir, "result/3_dmr/tables/1/dmr_raw.csv")
    if(file.exists(dmr_raw_file)) {
      message("⏳ 按需恢复 dmrs: ", dmr_raw_file)
      assign('dmrs', standardize_dmr_result_columns(read_csv(dmr_raw_file, show_col_types = FALSE)), envir = .GlobalEnv)
    }
  }

  if(exists('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    dmr_df <- standardize_dmr_result_columns(get('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv))
    if(!('gene_id_clean' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) && 'geneId' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) {
      dmr_df$gene_id_clean <- str_replace(dmr_df$geneId, "\\..*$", "")
    }
    if(!('annotation_simple' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) && 'annotation' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) {
      dmr_df$annotation_simple <- normalize_feature_label(dmr_df$annotation)
    }
    assign('dmr_anno_df', dmr_df, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }

  if(!exists('dmr_gr', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE) && exists('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    dmr_df <- get('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv)
    chr_col <- if('seqnames' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) 'seqnames' else if('chr' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) 'chr' else NA_character_
    if(!is.na(chr_col) && all(c('start', 'end', 'DMR_id') %in% colnames(dmr_df))) {
      dmr_gr_local <- GRanges(
        seqnames = dmr_df[[chr_col]],
        ranges = IRanges(start = dmr_df$start, end = dmr_df$end),
        DMR_id = dmr_df$DMR_id,
        diffMethy = if('diffMethy' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) dmr_df$diffMethy else if('diff.Methy' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) dmr_df$diff.Methy else NA_real_,
        meanMethy_group1 = dmr_df$meanMethy_group1,
        meanMethy_group2 = dmr_df$meanMethy_group2,
        group1_label = dmr_df$group1_label,
        group2_label = dmr_df$group2_label,
        DMR_type = if('DMR_type' %in% colnames(dmr_df)) dmr_df$DMR_type else NA_character_
      )
      assign('dmr_gr', dmr_gr_local, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    }
  }

  invisible(list(
    dmr_anno_df = if(exists('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) get('dmr_anno_df', envir = .GlobalEnv) else NULL,
    dmrs = if(exists('dmrs', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) get('dmrs', envir = .GlobalEnv) else NULL,
    dmr_gr = if(exists('dmr_gr', envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) get('dmr_gr', envir = .GlobalEnv) else NULL
  ))
}
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2.1 样本信息与全局参数
# ==============================================================================
sample_table <- read_reads_info(reads_info_path, root_dir = config$work_dir)
sample_ids <- sample_table$sample
group_levels <- unique(sample_table$group)

config$group1_name <- group_levels[[1]]
config$group2_name <- group_levels[[2]]
config$group1_idx <- which(sample_table$group == config$group1_name)
config$group2_idx <- which(sample_table$group == config$group2_name)

group_diff_label <- paste(config$group2_name, "-", config$group1_name)
group_diff_axis_label <- paste0("Methylation Difference (", group_diff_label, ")")

message(
  "✅ 读取 reads_info 完成: ",
  length(sample_ids), " 个样本，分组顺序 ",
  config$group1_name, " -> ", config$group2_name
)
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2.2 QC 展示位置说明
# ==============================================================================
# 具体 QC 表格和说明统一在 2_qc.Rmd 输出，避免 setup 和 QC 模块重复展示。
message("ℹ️ QC 展示已集中到 2_qc.Rmd；1_setup.Rmd 仅负责全局配置、样本信息和共享函数。")
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2.3 统一配色与作图主题
# ==============================================================================
wgbs_group_palette <- setNames(c("#A1C9F4", "#FF9F9B"), c(config$group1_name, config$group2_name))
wgbs_neutral_palette <- c("light" = "#FFFDF8", "mid" = "#D4D9DE", "dark" = "#5C6B73")
wgbs_accent_palette <- c(
  "warm" = "#FFB482",
  "green" = "#8DE5A1",
  "purple" = "#B39FDB",
  "yellow" = "#FDFFB6",
  "teal" = "#9ED9CC",
  "peach" = "#FFD3A8"
)
wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette <- c("low" = "#A1C9F4", "mid" = "#FDFFB6", "high" = "#FF9F9B")
wgbs_red_yellow_blue_binary_palette <- c(
  "zero" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
  "mid" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]),
  "one" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"])
)

feature_core_pal <- c(
  "Promoter" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]),
  "UTR" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["peach"]),
  "Exon" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"]),
  "Intron" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
  "Downstream" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["purple"]),
  "Intergenic" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["green"]),
  "Other" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"])
)
feature_alias_pal <- c(
  "Upstream" = feature_core_pal["Promoter"],
  "5' UTR" = feature_core_pal["UTR"],
  "3' UTR" = feature_core_pal["UTR"],
  "Gene Body" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["teal"]),
  "Distal" = feature_core_pal["Intergenic"]
)
profile_segment_pal <- unname(feature_core_pal[profile_segment_to_feature])
names(profile_segment_pal) <- names(profile_segment_to_feature)

viz_pal <- list(
  group = wgbs_group_palette,
  dmr = c(Hyper = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"]), Hypo = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"])),
  quadrant = c(
    "Hyper-Up" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]),
    "Hyper-Down" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["purple"]),
    "Hypo-Down" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["green"]),
    "Hypo-Up" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
    "NS" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"])
  ),
  cgi = c(
    "Island" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
    "N_Shore" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["green"]),
    "S_Shore" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]),
    "N_Shelf" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"]),
    "S_Shelf" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]),
    "Open_Sea" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"]),
    "Others" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"]),
    "NS" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"])
  ),
  feature_core = feature_core_pal,
  feature_alias = feature_alias_pal,
  profile_segment = profile_segment_pal,
  feature = c(feature_core_pal, feature_alias_pal),
  feature_accent = c(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette), unname(wgbs_accent_palette), unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"])),
  chr = c(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]), unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"])),
  burden_density = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
  burden_ratio = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]),
  motif = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["green"]),
  upset_sets = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["purple"]),
  upset_main = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]),
  track_cgi = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]),
  neutral = wgbs_neutral_palette,
  neutral_light = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["light"]),
  neutral_mid = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"]),
  neutral_dark = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["dark"]),
  sig_gradient = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette,
  diverging = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette,
  heatmap_diverging = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette,
  heatmap_sequential = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette,
  heatmap_binary = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_binary_palette,
  heat_compare = colorRampPalette(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette))(60),
  heat_warm = colorRampPalette(c(unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["light"]), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]), unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"]), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"])))(50),
  heat_meth = colorRampPalette(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette))(100),
  heat_meth_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 50, 100), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette)),
  feature_fun = function(n) colorRampPalette(c(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette), unname(wgbs_accent_palette)))(n),
  cgi_fun = function(n) colorRampPalette(c(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]), unname(wgbs_accent_palette["green"]), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["mid"]), unname(wgbs_accent_palette["warm"]), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"])))(n),
  meth_bin_fun = function(n) colorRampPalette(unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette))(n),
  # --- 富集分析专用配色 ---
```
