```{r}
  go_category = c("BP" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]), "CC" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]), "MF" = unname(wgbs_accent_palette["purple"])),
  enrich_p = wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette,
  score = c("pos" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]), "neg" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"])),
  accent = wgbs_accent_palette,
  de = c("up" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["high"]), "down" = unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette["low"]), "ns" = unname(wgbs_neutral_palette["mid"])),
  heat_meth_top_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 50, 100), unname(wgbs_red_yellow_blue_palette))
)

viz_style <- list(
  base_size = 13,
  axis_text = 11,
  axis_title = 12.5,
  title = 14.5,
  subtitle = 12,
  legend_title = 11,
  legend_text = 10,
  strip_text = 11,
  point_sm = 0.8,
  point_md = 1.2,
  point_lg = 2.6,
  line = 0.95,
  line_bold = 1.1
)

theme_wgbs_classic <- function(base_size = viz_style$base_size, legend = "right") {
  theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = base_size * 1.12, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = base_size * 0.94, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.96, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.88, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = viz_pal$neutral_light, color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9, face = "bold", color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      legend.position = legend,
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.85, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.78),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 10, 8, 8)
    )
}

theme_wgbs_minimal <- function(base_size = viz_style$base_size, legend = "right") {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = base_size * 1.12, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = base_size * 0.94, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.96, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.88, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_mid, 0.45), linewidth = 0.35),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = viz_pal$neutral_light, color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9, face = "bold", color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      legend.position = legend,
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.85, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.78),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 10, 8, 8)
    )
}

theme_wgbs_bw <- function(base_size = viz_style$base_size, legend = "right") {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = base_size * 1.12, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = base_size * 0.94, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.96, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.88, color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_mid, 0.45), linewidth = 0.35),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_dark, 0.35), linewidth = 0.5),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = viz_pal$neutral_light, color = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9, face = "bold", color = viz_pal$neutral_dark),
      legend.position = legend,
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size * 0.85, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size * 0.78),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 10, 8, 8)
    )
}

heatmap_diverging_col_fun <- function(x = NULL, midpoint = 0, breaks = NULL, colors = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging)) {
  if(!is.null(breaks)) {
    return(circlize::colorRamp2(breaks, colors))
  }

  values <- as.numeric(x)
  values <- values[is.finite(values)]
  if(length(values) == 0) {
    return(circlize::colorRamp2(c(-1, midpoint, 1), colors))
  }

  low_value <- min(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  high_value <- max(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  if(!is.finite(low_value) || !is.finite(high_value) || low_value == high_value) {
    low_value <- midpoint - 1
    high_value <- midpoint + 1
  } else if(midpoint <= low_value || midpoint >= high_value) {
    midpoint <- mean(c(low_value, high_value))
  }

  circlize::colorRamp2(c(low_value, midpoint, high_value), colors)
}

heatmap_sequential_col_fun <- function(x = NULL, breaks = NULL, colors = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_sequential)) {
  if(!is.null(breaks)) {
    return(circlize::colorRamp2(breaks, colors))
  }

  values <- as.numeric(x)
  values <- values[is.finite(values)]
  if(length(values) == 0) {
    return(circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 0.5, 1), colors))
  }

  low_value <- min(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  high_value <- max(values, na.rm = TRUE)
  if(!is.finite(low_value) || !is.finite(high_value) || low_value == high_value) {
    low_value <- 0
    high_value <- max(1, high_value)
  }
  mid_value <- mean(c(low_value, high_value))
  circlize::colorRamp2(c(low_value, mid_value, high_value), colors)
}

heatmap_binary_col_fun <- function() {
  circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 0.5, 1), unname(viz_pal$heatmap_binary))
}

scale_fill_wgbs_ryb <- function(...) {
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(colors = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_sequential), ...)
}

scale_color_wgbs_ryb <- function(...) {
  ggplot2::scale_color_gradientn(colors = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_sequential), ...)
}

scale_fill_heatmap_diverging <- function(midpoint = 0, limits = NULL, ...) {
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["low"]),
    mid = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["mid"]),
    high = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["high"]),
    midpoint = midpoint,
    limits = limits,
    ...
  )
}

scale_color_heatmap_diverging <- function(midpoint = 0, limits = NULL, ...) {
  ggplot2::scale_color_gradient2(
    low = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["low"]),
    mid = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["mid"]),
    high = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_diverging["high"]),
    midpoint = midpoint,
    limits = limits,
    ...
  )
}

scale_fill_heatmap_sequential <- function(...) {
  scale_fill_wgbs_ryb(...)
}

scale_color_heatmap_sequential <- function(...) {
  scale_color_wgbs_ryb(...)
}

scale_fill_heatmap_binary <- function(limits = c(0, 1), ...) {
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = unname(viz_pal$heatmap_binary),
    values = c(0, 0.5, 1),
    limits = limits,
    ...
  )
}

auto_y_axis <- function(values, padding = 0.2, min_span = 1.5, bounds = c(0, 100), n_breaks = 5) {
  values <- as.numeric(values)
  values <- values[is.finite(values)]

  if(length(values) == 0) {
    limits <- bounds
  } else {
    low_value <- min(values, na.rm = TRUE)
    high_value <- max(values, na.rm = TRUE)
    span <- high_value - low_value
    if(!is.finite(span) || span == 0) {
      center <- mean(c(low_value, high_value), na.rm = TRUE)
      span <- min_span
      low_value <- center - span / 2
      high_value <- center + span / 2
    } else if(span < min_span) {
      center <- mean(c(low_value, high_value))
      low_value <- center - min_span / 2
      high_value <- center + min_span / 2
      span <- min_span
    }
    pad <- span * padding
    limits <- c(low_value - pad, high_value + pad)
  }

  limits <- pmax(limits, bounds[1])
  limits <- pmin(limits, bounds[2])
  if(diff(limits) <= 0) {
    limits <- bounds
  }

  list(
    limits = limits,
    breaks = pretty(limits, n = n_breaks)
  )
}
```
